base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of leever_emerge_move — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Leever — 3-frame desert-sandshark: emerge-from-sand / partial-emerge / full-emerge + 2-frame walk (when above ground). Desert biome only. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
